dawnn 2.0.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

Sanity check input parameters

param_check.Rd

`param_check()' verifies that the parameters passed to run_dawnn() are sane.

Usage

param_check(
  cells,
  label_names,
  label_1,
  label_2,
  reduced_dim,
  recalculate_graph
)

Arguments

cells

Seurat object containing the dataset.

label_names

String containing the name of the meta.data slot in `cells' containing the labels of each cell.

label_1

String containing the name of one of the labels.

label_2

String containing the name of the other label.

reduced_dim

String containing the name of the dimensionality reduction to use.

recalculate_graph

Boolean whether to recalculate the KNN graph. If FALSE, then the one stored in the cells object will be used (optional, default = TRUE).

Value

TRUE if all parameters sane, otherwise stop execution with error message.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
param_check(cells, label_names, label_1, label_2, reduced_dim,
recalculate_graph)
} # }
